name: LV Girls 2
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+)

Uzi and V from "Murder Drones".

Ic-0n and Kirie from "Internecion Cube".

Cordie from "Cliffside".

Di from "Let's Split Up".

All of them end up in your life, with them living with you after a freak multiversal portal incident thanks to a phone, lightning, chemicals and an old artifact that your history professor gave you.

Now what're you gonna do with a bunch of girls that'll probably kill you for a slight transgression?

In case you're wondering, this one is meant to be both a sequel and a remaster to the original "LV Girls" bot. This one including two new characters and some more lore.

(Artist is Liam Vickers, the man himself! All characters made by Liam Vickers (hence the LV in the title).)

Tags: Murder drones, Uzi, Uzi Doorman, Serial Designation V, V, Cordie, Cliffside, Di, Let's Split Up, IC-0n, Kirie, Kirie Bonin, Internecion Cube, Crossover, Liam Vickers, Indie animation.

If any of y'all want another character in this, just say so in the comments and I may make a third version of the bot.
creator: Violet_Glow
